title: Synchronization
wikitext:
[]: Synchronization             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Wed Jul 30, 2014 9:15 am I wonder how is done a synch test. The pilots have to do it in a certain frequence to test if they are synchronizated with their EVAs, but how they do it? What do you have to do to synchronizate with the EVA? Is it clarified when the pilots have to do it?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jul 30, 2014 9:17 am The authors wave their hands around a bit, then Ritsuko and Misato come up with some numbers to get angsty about. What, you wanted a real answer?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 30, 2014 9:32 am Get in the Eva and be sexually frustrated really hard.

[]:             Quote Post by Ieyasu » Wed Jul 30, 2014 9:52 am I did wonder if those two things on the head have electrodes sliding inside their brains for synch because... eurgh.

[]:             Quote Post by Thomas68 » Wed Jul 30, 2014 9:59 am pwhodges wrote: The authors wave their hands around a bit, then Ritsuko and Misato come up with some numbers to get angsty about. What, you wanted a real answer?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Jul 30, 2014 10:08 am Well, I can't see anything in the show that tells me more than that; and as there's no real science involved, there will be no real answer either. Really, even if there is anything more in the CI, for instance, it will still only consist of a string of buzzwords. But if you want the accumulated wisdom on the subject, try asking the wiki , where it's already laid out for you .

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Jul 30, 2014 11:54 am pwhodges wrote: Really, even if there is anything more in the CI, for instance, it will still only consist of a string of buzzwords.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Jul 30, 2014 12:39 pm Tune your mind with your mother's, grasshopper. Only then shall you achieve synchronization. Or by being under Asuka's boobies.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Wed Jul 30, 2014 12:49 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Tune your mind with your mother's
